name: Skillhub Plugin
description: Injects Skillhub policy into prompt build so agents prefer the primary Skillhub registry and fallback cleanly.

primaryCli.label: Primary CLI
primaryCli.help: Command the agent should try first for skills discovery/install (default: skillhub).

fallbackCli.label: Fallback CLI
fallbackCli.help: Command used when primary registry is unavailable or has no match (default: clawhub).

primaryLabel.label: Primary Label
primaryLabel.help: Short display label for the primary registry in injected guidance.

fallbackLabel.label: Fallback Label
fallbackLabel.help: Short display label for the fallback registry in injected guidance.

extraNote.label: Extra Note
extraNote.help: Optional extra policy line appended to injected guidance.
